---
title: "\'A Bit of Green\'"
---

## \'A Bit of Green\'

**Author:** Juliana Horatia Ewing
**Date:** 1861
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (July 1861) 80-92.

### Notes

Signed J. J. G.. Reprinted in Ewing\'s [[otherbook:330]<i>Melchior\'s Dream and Other Tales</i>] (1862).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
